QrCode.title: QrCode
QrCode.description: Represents a generated QR code, including its original source URL, the URL to the generated image, and associated metadata.

id.description: Unique identifier for the QrCode entity.

originalUrl.description: The original URL or text content that was encoded into this QR code.

qrCodeImageUrl.description: The URL where the generated QR code image is stored.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the QR code was generated.

status.description: The current operational status of the QR code (e.g., 'active', 'inactive').

userId.description: Reference to the User who generated or saved this QR code.

totalScans.description: The total number of times this QR code has been scanned/redirected.

lastScannedAt.description: The most recent timestamp when this QR code was scanned.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of the user.

definition.description: Stores individual QR codes generated by a specific user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of the user who owns this QR code.

params.name: qrCodeId
params.description: The unique identifier for the specific QR code document.

params.name: adminId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of the user designated as an administrator.

firestore.reasoning: Standard hierarchical structure with userId path Wildcards. QR codes include totalScans and lastScannedAt for tracking metrics.
